---
title: "KUB Datalab slides"
format: html
---

- [Intro](slides/intro.qmd)
- [normalfordelingen](slides/normalfordelingen.qmd)
- [SEM](slides/SEM.qmd)
- [Kategoriske data](slides/kategoriske.qmd)
- [Lineær regression](slides/linreg.qmd)
- [Logistisk regression](slides/logistisk.qmd)
- [Power beregninger](slides/power.qmd)
- [side-by-side demo](slides/side-by-side-demo.qmd)
